stemHtml: Which of the following form part of the minimum requirements for an operator's management system, according to the EU Regulation on Air Operations?

options.a: A description of the operator`s company structure, legal structure, and management personnel.
options.b: A description of the overall philosophies and principles of the operator with regard to safety, referred to as the Safety Guidance Letter.
options.c: A description of the operator`s economic goals, including all measures for meeting and exceeding related key performance indicators.
options.d: Clearly defined lines of responsibility and accountability throughout the operator, including a direct safety accountability of the accountable manager.
